reason: Genetic editing shapes society, and a man chases identity beyond his genes.
A hacker’s life is rewritten by a virus as she fights to reclaim her past.
Memory recordings on tape bring unintended emotional fallout to relationships.
A writer’s body swap upends how he relates, as he lives outside his own flesh.
A family’s themed vacation finds real-world stakes when dinosaurs reboot.
An implant unlocks memories but leaves the host scrambling for self.
Alien tech in a moon relic suggests memory and culture may redefine human bonds.
A boy’s new girlfriend recalls creatures from his imagination, shifting his reality.
A fossil theme park revives dinosaurs, forcing survivors to confront loss.
A widower’s radio confession creates unexpected real-world connections.
